Overview

Trusted Driveway Gate Installers in Mill Hill

If you are looking for driveway gates in Mill Hill, you have come to the right place. We work exclusively with experienced installers who have completed at least 50 residential gate projects, carry full public liability insurance, and offer written warranties on every job. That level of experience means better engineering, cleaner finishes, and gates that work reliably for years.

Our Mill Hill installers offer free site surveys as standard. They will visit your property, measure up, discuss material and design options, assess ground conditions and any gradient issues, and provide a detailed written quote with no hidden costs. There is no obligation to proceed at any stage.

Services

Gate Types Available in Mill Hill

Electric Sliding Gates in Mill Hill

Space-saving automated gates that slide horizontally along your boundary wall. Perfect for driveways where a swinging gate would eat into parking space.

Get free quotes

Electric Swing Gates in Mill Hill

Classic double or single swing gates with electric automation. The most popular choice for London driveways with enough clearance in front of or behind the gate.

Get free quotes

Wooden Driveway Gates in Mill Hill

Handcrafted timber gates that bring warmth and character to your property. Available in hardwoods like iroko and oak, or treated softwoods for a more affordable option.

Get free quotes

Metal Driveway Gates in Mill Hill

Wrought iron, steel, and aluminium gates ranging from traditional ornate designs to sleek contemporary styles. Built to last and available in any colour.

Get free quotes

Automated Gate Systems in Mill Hill

Full automation packages including motors, intercoms, keypads, remote controls, and smart home integration. Upgrade an existing gate or include with a new installation.

Get free quotes

Gate Repair and Maintenance in Mill Hill

Keep your gates running smoothly with regular servicing, or fix problems fast with same-day repair callouts across London. Motors, hinges, intercoms, and safety systems.

Get free quotes

Gate Automation (Retrofit) in Mill Hill

Already have manual gates? Add motors, intercoms, and smart access without replacing the gate itself. Retrofit automation works on most timber and metal swing or sliding gates.

Get free quotes

Commercial Gates in Mill Hill

Heavy-duty security gates for schools, industrial estates, office parks, car parks, and commercial premises across London. CCTV integration, access control, and LPS 1175 rated options.

Get free quotes

Aluminium Driveway Gates in Mill Hill

Lightweight, rust-proof aluminium gates in any RAL colour. The fastest-growing gate material in London — zero maintenance, sharp modern aesthetics, and 25-year powder coat guarantees.

Get free quotes

Composite Driveway Gates in Mill Hill

The fastest-growing gate material in London. Composite gates give you the authentic timber look without rot, warping, or annual maintenance. Ideal for homeowners who want wood aesthetics with zero upkeep.

Get free quotes

Hardwood Driveway Gates in Mill Hill

Premium iroko, European oak, and Accoya gates for heritage homes, conservation areas, and affluent London properties. Hand-crafted to match your property's character, with 25-year material guarantees.

Get free quotes

Wrought Iron Gates in Mill Hill

Traditional hand-forged wrought iron gates for London period homes, heritage properties, and conservation areas. Ornate scrollwork, fleur-de-lis finials, and bespoke designs that last generations.

Get free quotes

Pedestrian and Side Gates in Mill Hill

Matching pedestrian gates, side access gates, and wicket gates for London properties. Secure foot access without opening the main driveway gate — available in all materials and with optional automation.

Get free quotes
Pricing Guide 2026

How Much Do Driveway Gates Cost in Mill Hill?

Driveway gate prices in Mill Hill vary depending on the gate type, material, and level of automation. Below are typical costs from vetted installers in the Mill Hill area. All prices are in GBP and include full installation.

Gate TypePrice RangeInstall TimeIncludes
Electric Sliding Gates (Fully Installed)£4,500 – £12,0003 to 5 daysGate + motor + track + remotes
Electric Swing Gates (Fully Installed)£3,500 – £10,0002 to 4 daysGate + motor + posts + remotes
Wooden Driveway Gates (Installed)£2,500 – £8,0002 to 4 daysBespoke timber + hardware
Metal Driveway Gates (Installed)£2,800 – £9,5002 to 4 daysFabricated + galvanised + coated
Gate Automation Retrofit£1,200 – £3,5001 to 2 daysMotor + safety + remotes
Gate Repair and Servicing£150 – £800Same day to 2 daysCallout + labour + parts
Electric Sliding Gates (Fully Installed)£4,500 – £12,000
3 to 5 days
Electric Swing Gates (Fully Installed)£3,500 – £10,000
2 to 4 days
Wooden Driveway Gates (Installed)£2,500 – £8,000
2 to 4 days
Metal Driveway Gates (Installed)£2,800 – £9,500
2 to 4 days
Gate Automation Retrofit£1,200 – £3,500
1 to 2 days
Gate Repair and Servicing£150 – £800
Same day to 2 days
0% Finance Available
From £99/month
Over 6 to 36 months at 0% APR
Subject to status
Every Quote Includes
  • ✓Free site survey and measurement
  • ✓Bespoke gate design and fabrication
  • ✓All groundwork, posts, and foundations
  • ✓Automation motor, remotes, and safety sensors
  • ✓Intercom or keypad wiring (where specified)
  • ✓Full commissioning, testing, and handover
Spread the Cost at 0%

Many of our London installers offer 0% finance on gate installations, letting you spread the cost from as little as £99 per month. Subject to status and approval.

From £99/month
Over 6 to 36 months at 0% APR

The cost of driveway gates in Mill Hill depends on several factors: the material, whether you want automation, the width of your entrance, and any bespoke design requirements. London prices tend to sit at the higher end nationally, but the installers in our Mill Hill network are competitively priced. Every installer offers a free site survey so you can get an accurate, itemised quote before any commitment.
